steps.stepDescription: Open the mock trading app at http://localhost:4200 and login as Maker
steps.expectedOutput: Dashboard page loads and navbar shows admin (maker)

steps.stepDescription: Open the Trading dropdown and navigate to New Trade
Fill the New Trade form for a BUY trade and submit
Open the Trading dropdown and navigate to Approval Queue
steps.expectedOutput: The submitted BUY AAPL 100 trade appears as pending_approval in the queue

steps.stepDescription: Open the mock trading app at http://localhost:4200 and login as Maker
steps.expectedOutput: Dashboard page loads and navbar shows admin (maker)

steps.stepDescription: Open the Trading dropdown and navigate to New Trade
Fill the New Trade form for a SELL trade and submit
Open the Trading dropdown and navigate to Approval Queue
steps.expectedOutput: The submitted SELL MSFT 50 trade appears as pending_approval in the queue

steps.stepDescription: Open the mock trading app at http://localhost:4200 and login as Checker
steps.expectedOutput: Navbar shows checker and Approval Queue is accessible

steps.stepDescription: Open the Trading dropdown and navigate to Approval Queue
steps.expectedOutput: Queue lists pending_approval trades including the AAPL BUY row

steps.stepDescription: Click Approve on the first pending AAPL BUY row
steps.expectedOutput: Approval toast confirms and the row no longer appears as pending_approval

steps.stepDescription: Open the Trading dropdown and navigate to Dashboard
steps.expectedOutput: Dashboard lists the approved AAPL trade and Total Trades count reflects it

steps.stepDescription: Open the Trading dropdown and navigate to Trade List
steps.expectedOutput: Trade List displays the approved AAPL BUY 100 row with Status column populated
